en.atmosphere: Single-line terminus. Bedroom community with 32,150 daily riders.
en.landmarks: Large green space (279k sqm). Walking trails, parks.
en.food: Izakaya-centric (63 spots). Lively evenings, salaryman density.
en.nightlife: Active izakaya scene (64 late spots). Karaoke sparse.

ja.landmarks: 大きな公園（279k㎡）。緑の散歩道。
ja.food: 居酒屋中心（63軒）。夜は賑やか。
ja.nightlife: 深夜営業64軒。居酒屋主体。カラオケ0軒。
